titleStmt.title: SII 27.63: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 63. (A.R. No. 357 of 1930-31.) KANYANA, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Gubbukōṇe Gōpālakṛishṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1306, Raktākshi, Jyēshṭha śu. 2, Sunday corresponding to 1384 A.D., May 22.

It registers the grant of certain privileges to the mahājagattu by the jananis of Rājāḍi Bellatūr when Gaṇa[pa]rasa, the taḷuvara of Jakkarasa-oḍeya was administering. The latter who was a mahāpradhāna is stated to have been governing Bārakūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī manmahā ma
ṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāya vibhāḍa
bhāsege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa pūrvva paścima Uttara
dakṣiṇa catussamudrādhipati śrīmanmahāvīra hari
hararāya mahārāyaru rājyābhyudayaṁ geyyu(ṁ)ttamiddalli śakavaThe letter ya is engraved above the line in smaller siśe.
ruṣa 1306 raktākṣi saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭha su 2 Ādivāradaṁ
du śrī manmahāpradhānaṁ jakkarasa Oḍeyaru bārakū
ra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu rājāḍi bellatūra janani
gaḷu mahājagattige māḍisikoṭṭa mānya śilāśāsa
nada kramameṁteṁdaḍe jakkarasa Oḍeyara taḷuvaragaṇa
parasanu Adhikāravamāḍuvalli Ā Ūravarige jagarttinavarige
Ā caṁdrārkkavāgi kārutiṁgaḷu tāreya tiṁgaḷali Āṇi
kuḍi Ūrāṇe kāḷubīya Āudūsalladu sōne
ya tiṁgaḷali sōne mariyāde saluŪdu yiṁ
tappudake The line is
nya śāsanakke Arutappidavarugaḷu sōmasuri
ya grahaṇadali vāraṇāsiyali sāvirakavi
leya koṁda pāpadali hōharu . dāne pālane
yōrmadhyē pālanaṁtu viśiṣyatē dānāt svarga
mavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 27.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
